response.step_by_step_log: 1. Identified performer as Anya Melfissa based on the video hashtag #DetectiveAnya3D. 2. Observed on-screen text 'Music: Ayase' and 'UNDEAD'. 3. Searched 'UNDEAD Ayase lyrics' to confirm the song and obtain full lyrics. 4. Mapped scenes: intro skit (00:00-02:21) and musical performance (02:22-05:01).
response.global_summary: A 3D musical performance by VTuber Anya Melfissa featuring her singing the song 'UNDEAD' by Ayase. The video starts with a short dramatic skit before the performance begins.

scenes.description: Anya Melfissa is seen sleeping on a couch in a dramatic, black and white illustrated scene, which sets up the performance.
Anya Melfissa performs the song 'UNDEAD' on a 3D stage with digital effects and light displays. The song title 'UNDEAD' and credits 'Lyrics, Music: Ayase' are displayed on screen.
